summary: Lane RL-004 secrets audit completed. Found 8 existing redaction mechanisms (all narrowly scoped), 5 critical gaps (no subprocess env filtering, no file-read security, no bash security, no general output scrubber, no ENV_BLOCKLIST), and 13 high-risk secret leak sites across the codebase. Produced a comprehensive 5-layer secrets handling policy (Detection, Prevention, Scrubbing, Guarding, Integrity) and identified 2 immediate active-leak fixes. Artifact written to docs/json/opencode/secrets/rl-004-findings.v1.json with full risk assessment, site inventory, and implementation roadmap.
